text: Quiet luxury is really just having a good tailor and a cashmere addiction. The Row lookbook lives in my head rent free.
Old money aesthetic feels performative on TikTok now. It's just Ralph Lauren cosplay for people with debt.
Stealth wealth basics: navy crewneck, gray flannels, unbranded loafers. Nothing screams, everything whispers.
Honestly quiet luxury is a marketing term. Rich people always dressed like this.
Understated luxury > logo mania. My closet finally feels like mine.
The stealth wealth thing is exhausting. It's just beige.
Best quiet luxury piece I own: an unlined cashmere blazer. Wears like a sweatshirt.
Old money aesthetic on Pinterest is 90% white girls at horse farms. Where is the range.

올드머니룩 진짜 예쁘다. 니트 하나에 슬랙스만 입어도 분위기 다름.
조용한 럭셔리 트렌드 그냥 비싸 보이려는 마케팅 아님?
